name: CheckSmart
description_short: 5005 Preston Hwy in Louisville, KY, CheckSmart provides check cashing, payday loans, and financial services with extended hours.
description_long:
CheckSmart's Preston Hwy location sits at 5005 Preston Hwy Unit 103 in Louisville, KY, offering convenient check cashing and financial services in the area. The store operates with extended hours to serve Louisville residents: Monday through Thursday 9AM to 7PM, Friday 8AM to 7PM, and weekend hours Saturday 9AM to 4PM and Sunday 11AM to 4PM, making it easy to stop by before or after work.

At this Louisville CheckSmart location, you can cash checks, apply for payday loans, and access other financial services. The staff is ready to help with your banking needs. For specific questions about rates, requirements, or services available at this Preston Hwy location, call 502-810-0861.

If you're in Louisville, KY and need quick check cashing or a short-term loan, this CheckSmart location on Preston Hwy is accessible and ready to help. Bring your ID and the check you want to cash, or be prepared to discuss your loan application. CheckSmart serves Louisville's financial needs with fast, straightforward service.
pros: Extended operating hours including Friday 8:00 AM - 8:00 PM and weekend availability for working customers
Multiple locations across Ohio (10+ stores) providing geographic accessibility in Columbus and surrounding areas
In-store Green Dot Visa Debit Card issuance available same-day without waiting
Online appointment scheduling to reduce in-store wait times
Comprehensive money services under one roof: check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and bill pay
Gift card exchange service providing liquidity for unused gift cards
Clear documentation requirements listed upfront to streamline application process
cons: Does not directly originate loans; operates only as a broker for third-party lenders, limiting control over terms and rates
No fee or APR information disclosed on the website, making it impossible to assess actual costs upfront
Short-term lending positioning suggests products likely carry high costs typical of emergency cash category
Limited detail about eligibility requirements or loan amounts available
Check cashing and money services typically charge per-transaction fees not disclosed on this page
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers needing check cashing and money transfer services
Working individuals seeking convenient extended-hours access to money services and bill pay
Consumers seeking immediate prepaid card access without bank account requirement
Customers needing access to short-term emergency loans with same-day or next-day funding
diagnosis: CheckSmart is best for unbanked consumers and working individuals needing convenient check cashing, money transfer, and bill pay services with extended hours. The primary caveat is that while it functions as a check cashing storefront, its lending operations are brokered through third parties with undisclosed rates and fees, making it difficult to assess actual lending value before visiting a store.
services: Green Dot Visa Debit Card issuance
meta_description: CheckSmart at 5005 Preston Hwy, Louisville, KY. Check cashing and payday loans with extended hours.
